title: More Vanilla Fuel
description: Adds More fuel using Vanilla block and items!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YBjTEiUY/images/9a0d6c1b5ac0f6d220671929528faf5436510753.png)

# 🔥 More Fuel Mod 

The mod adds more fuel options that are not available in the Vanilla version of the game!

You need [Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) to play on Quilt!

<details>
<summary>List of new fuel blocks!</summary>
(For mod version 1.8.1)

- Activator rail
- Armor Stand
- Arrow
- Azalea (Normal & Flowering)
- Banner Pattern (All)
- Beds (All colors)
- Beehive
- Book
- Book and Quill
- Brush
- Carrot on a stick
- Chest with minecart
- Detector rail
- Empty Map
- Fire Charge
- Fungus on a stick
- Glow Berries
- Glowing Item Frame
- Item Frame
- Leash
- Leaves (All types)
- Lever
- Paintings
- Paper
- Powered rail
- Piston
- Rail
- Redstone Lamp
- Redstone Torch
- Shield
- Soul Torch
- Sticky Piston
- Sweet Berries
- Target Block
- Torch
- Tripwire Hook
</details>



![Beehive in Furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YBjTEiUY/images/38d889b5d200fcd9d011ea59d32b1a7648194e40.png)
